content_body: This was our first trip to the Blue Ridge area, and we found it to be beautiful! It reminded us of our home state of Wisconsin - but even more beautiful wit the mountains and the winding roads. We loved the cabin! It was exactly what we were looking for - a peaceful home away from home. There was a place for everyone to get away and spend some quality "quiet" time with our Creator. Our 13 year old son is now a pool shark and our 11, 7, and 2 year old daughters LOVED building dams in the creek. Our 7-month old baby just enjoyed the fresh air and pitch dark room at night! We took several nightly drives down Hwy 60 looking for wild life and 8:00 seemed to be the magic hour for deer! There was so much to do and explore - we can't wait to come again! Thank you so much.  John 3:16
title: Summer Vacation in the North Georgia Mountains
